raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is the first state to directly target greenhouse gas emissions from cement.",
    "Senate Bill 596 is the first bill in any California sector to focus on achieving net-zero emissions.",
    "Cement production accounts for 7% of all global greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "Cement production contributes about 8 million metric tons of CO2 each year in California.",
    "Cement production is the second-largest industrial source of greenhouse gas emissions in California, after the oil and gas sector.",
    "SB 596 requires the creation of a comprehensive strategy to achieve net-zero emission cement by 2045.",
    "The California cement manufacturers have adopted a goal of reaching carbon neutrality by 2045.",
    "California's regulatory framework under SB 596 aims to lower carbon emissions in the cement industry.",
    "SB 596 will lead the way nationally to address emissions from cement production.",
    "The implementation of SB 596 is expected to influence other states' policies on cement emissions."
  ]
}
```
